messages.content: Final validation passes: focused Ruff/type/compile checks, 2 promotion-gate tests, exact aggregate-cost assertions, 70-file artifact completeness, matched-input hashes, privacy scan, zero pods, and a 41-entry zero-stub Demolab build. I’m committing and pushing this exact final state now.

The experiment itself is complete; the remaining work is publication hygiene: update PR #52 from its stale exp069 description, post the final evidence log, seal one last transcript checkpoint, and verify the refreshed preview. I’m using the GitHub publishing workflow for that handoff now.

PR #52 now reflects exp070 and the complete killed-ladder result. The only CI red is the already-known repository-wide type debt; the exp070 checks are clean. I’m sealing the final activity checkpoint next, then I’ll rebuild, push, and verify the public pages.
